CweFindings.Name: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
CweFindings.Description: The product specifies permissions for a security-critical resource in a way that allows that resource to be read or modified by unintended actors.
CweFindings.Explanation: The application exposes all Spring Boot actuator management endpoints over HTTP via `management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=*` in `src/main/resources/application.properties:17` while including the actuator module in `pom.xml:43`. In this codebase there is no Spring Security dependency or other access-control configuration protecting those endpoints, so sensitive operational resources are configured to be readable by unintended actors.
